name: Mythic Ascendancy
short_description: A fantasy strategy autobattler where you summon monsters, build powerful synergies, and outsmart your enemies round after round.
detailed_description: Enter a world of stunning fantasy art and tactical depth in this strategy autobattler where every decision counts. You’ll alternate between summoning unique monsters, boosting their stats, arranging your formation, and watching your strategy play out in automated combat. Build powerful synergies through factions and traits, outsmart your enemies, and adapt as the stakes rise. In the later stages, summon awe-inspiring gods to join your team and face off against powerful enemy bosses that will test your planning and luck like never before. Prepare to summon, strategize, and conquer.
